title: Nursery Rhyme. CCLXXX. Games.
content:
[The following is used by schoolboys, when two are starting to run a race.]

        One to make ready,
            And two to prepare;
        Good luck to the rider,
            And away goes the mare.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. CCLXXX. Games."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
